notes: M222 is the v2.4 go/no-go spike and is NOT the final milestone (M223-M226 remain) — no release->main merge, no v2.4 tag at this close. The make-or-break decision came back GO: the recruiter candidate-comparison surface is demo-servable from the dockerized apps/web and renders from seedable data, refuting BA-3. The milestone's headline finding is the MIRROR-TABLE TRAP (D2): the shown candidate score is public.local_jobsimulation_sessions.score, NOT jobsimulation.sessions.score — seeding the obvious table renders EMPTY (the M219 render-gate-bypasses-the-seed class). The gate lands foundation only (no HiringSeeder/funnel — correctly M223). Zero platform-clone edits; hiring.md's read-path was TRACED against the platform clones, not inferred, and re-verified file:line at close.
